commands.name: build-and-zip
commands.title: Build And Zip
commands.description: 自动识别项目类型后执行打包并压缩部署文件

preferences.name: workspaceRoots
preferences.title: Workspace Roots
preferences.description: 扫描白名单仅支持 /Users/husky/workSpace/7-lk 与 /Users/husky/workSpace/10-lknodejs

preferences.name: nodeBuildScript
preferences.title: Node Build Script
preferences.description: Node 项目默认执行的构建脚本名

preferences.name: javaHome
preferences.title: Java Home
preferences.description: 构建时使用的 JAVA_HOME（用于 Maven/Ant）

preferences.name: antBuildFile
preferences.title: Ant Build File
preferences.description: Ant 默认构建文件名（优先使用该文件）

preferences.name: mavenSettings
preferences.title: Maven Settings
preferences.description: Maven settings.xml 路径（会自动拼接 -s）

preferences.name: mavenRepoLocal
preferences.title: Maven Local Repo
preferences.description: Maven 本地仓库目录（会自动拼接 -Dmaven.repo.local）

preferences.name: mavenProfile
preferences.title: Maven Profile
preferences.description: Maven 构建 profile（会自动拼接 -P）

commands.name: build-and-zip-status
commands.title: Build And Zip Status
commands.description: 在菜单栏查看后台构建与压缩任务状态

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
